Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Secluded Course
Waystone (Tier 14)
--------
Revives Available: 0 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +42% (augmented)
Pack Size: +19% (augmented)
Monster Rarity: +23% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +110% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 80
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Penetrating" (Tier: 1) }
Monster Damage Penetrates 12(12-14)% Elemental Resistances
{ Prefix Modifier "Fleeting" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 14(10-15)% increased Attack, Cast and Movement Speed
{ Prefix Modifier "Tough" (Tier: 1) }
23(20-25)% more Monster Life
{ Suffix Modifier "Sleet" (Tier: 1) }
Area has patches of Chilled Ground
{ Suffix Modifier "of Exposure" (Tier: 1) }
-6(-8--6)% maximum Player Resistances
{ Suffix Modifier "of the Prism" (Tier: 1) }
+33(30-34)% Monster Elemental Resistances
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
--------
Corrupted
